title: Upstage
writer: Walter DeLeon, Lorna Moon, Joseph Farnham
actors: Norma Shearer, Oscar Shaw, Tenen Holtz
plot: Dolly Havens, a small-town girl with big-town ambitions that are larger than her talents, hooks up with Johnny Storm, a vaudeville performer, whose talents make the act a success. Dolly, thinking she is the reason, meets a handsom...
